description: LeapScholar is a study-abroad counseling and admissions platform focused on helping Indian students find universities, prepare applications, and get visa and test-prep support. Its public site also includes university/course discovery content and an AI chat experience for study-abroad queries.
summary: LeapScholar exposes a public MCP server at `https://abroadly-ls.leapscholar.com/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on leapscholar.com.
